instruction: 请阅读以下论文片段，提取该研究的标题及其所有作者，并建立 AUTHORED_BY 关系。
input: Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models. Xingtong Yu, Chang Zhou, Yuan Fang †, and Xinming Zhang †. Singapore Management University, University of Science and Technology of China.

output.subject: Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models
Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models
Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models
Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models

instruction: 分析文本片段，识别文中提出的模型及其所属论文，建立 PROPOSED_BY 关系。
input: In this work, we propose MDGPT, a foundational graph framework for Text-Free Multi-Domain Graph Pre-Training, to facilitate downstream adaptation to both seen and unseen domains.

output.subject: MDGPT
output.object: Text-Free Multi-domain Graph Pre-training: Toward Graph Foundation Models

instruction: 根据实验设置描述，提取 MDGPT 模型评估时所使用的所有数据集，建立 USES_DATASET 关系。
input: We conduct experiments on five benchmark datasets. (1) Cora, (2) Citeseer and (3) Pubmed are citation graphs from different fields... (4) Photo and (5) Computers are both e-commerce networks from Amazon... (6) Reddit is a social network.

instruction: 识别 MDGPT 模型为了解决多域对齐挑战而引入的核心研究概念（Concept），并建立 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: In MDGPT, we propose a series of domain tokens to align node features from different domains. Each domain-specific token is associated with a source domain, serving to bridge the semantic meanings in distinct domains.

instruction: 从关于下游适配的描述中，提取相关的技术概念并建立与模型的 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: In MDGPT, we propose dual prompts, consisting of a unifying prompt and a mixing prompt, to align the downstream target domain with the source domains, thus facilitating the transfer of multi-domain knowledge.

instruction: 提取片段中提及的与 MDGPT 进行对比的基准模型（Model），建立 CITED_BY 关系表示引用对比。
input: We evaluate MDGPT against state-of-the-art approaches... inclusive of GCN, GAT, DGI/InfoGraph, GraphCL, Hassani, GPPT, GPF, GraphPrompt and GCOPE.

instruction: 根据文本描述，识别 MDGPT 模型在实验评估中所达成的指标（Metric），并建立 ACHIEVED_ON 关系。
input: MDGPT surpasses all baseline methods across all settings, outperforming the best competitor by 3.5–37.9% on node classification and 4.3–13.9% on graph classification. Accuracy is reported as the primary metric.

instruction: 识别文中提到的关于特征维度对齐的技术实现手段，建立其与模型的 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: A straightforward solution is to use a dimension alignment method to transform the features into consistent dimensions across domains. In our work, each alignment function is implemented using SVD.

instruction: 从关于多任务适配的描述中，提取涉及的任务概念及其与模型的关系。
input: We conduct two types of downstream task, namely, node classification, and graph classification... we pre-train the graph encoder once and then apply the same pre-trained model for all types of downstream tasks.

instruction: 提取片段中关于异质性鲁棒性的描述，识别对应的 Concept 及其关系。
input: To further evaluate the robustness of MDGPT across homophilic and heterophilic graphs, we conduct cross-domain experiments on datasets like Texas, Wisconsin, Cornell, and Squirrel.
